message:
fix: partition catalog null/undefined → NULL_SENTINEL instead of String()

String(null) produces "null" which collides with an actual string
partition value "null".  Similarly String(undefined) produces
"undefined".  Now uses partKey() helper with NULL_SENTINEL, consistent
with the rest of the codebase (partial-agg, executor, operators).

Affects: fromFragments() index building, register() ingest path,
matchFilter() eq/in/neq/not_in lookup — all 9 String() call sites.
